name: wormhook
_comment: No 'version' field for now — under active development, so installs track marketplace HEAD and pick up new IOC signatures on each update. A versioning lifecycle may land once the signature set settles.
description: npm/node supply-chain malware scanner for Claude Code. Tiered hook detecting Shai-Hulud (1.0-3.0 + Mini), Axios/DPRK RAT, SANDWORM_MODE, and remote-eval loaders via filename, SHA256, and behavioral IOCs.
